description:
Train with a plan, log every set, and understand your progress without spreadsheets.

StreakRep Fit is a strength training tracker built for lifters, beginners, home training users, and gym athletes who want a clear routine, fast workout logging, and better visibility into what is actually improving.

PLAN SMARTER WORKOUTS
Create your own workout plan or explore ready-made programs for strength, hypertrophy, general fitness, home training, and gym training. Choose training days, goals, equipment, location, exercises, sets, rep ranges, rest times, and progression details so every session has structure before you start.

LOG EVERY SET FAST
During a workout, record weight, reps, completed sets, RPE, rest, notes, and exercise details with a focused session flow. StreakRep keeps your previous context close, so you can stop guessing what you lifted last time and stay focused on the next set.

SEE PROGRESS THAT MAKES SENSE
Track weekly volume, sessions, streaks, consistency, estimated 1RM, personal records, exercise history, strength trends, and progressive overload. The dashboard turns training data into simple visuals so you can spot momentum, plateaus, and missed training patterns.

UNDERSTAND MUSCLE BALANCE
Use the visual exercise catalog and muscle map to browse by body area, select target muscles, review related movements, and understand which muscle groups your plan is training. It is easier to build balanced routines when chest, back, legs, arms, shoulders, core, glutes, and calves are visible at a glance.

TRAIN AT HOME OR IN THE GYM
Filter exercises by equipment, environment, difficulty, and training style. Build routines around dumbbells, barbells, machines, cables, resistance bands, bodyweight movements, mobility, stretching, cardio, or rehabilitation-style recovery work.

STAY CONSISTENT
StreakRep helps you know what to train today, what is scheduled next, how your week is going, and when your training load needs attention. Use quick logging, calendar planning, widgets, Live Activities, and Apple Watch support to keep your routine close wherever you train.

CONNECT WITH APPLE HEALTH
With your permission, StreakRep can read and write compatible Apple Health data such as workouts, activity, body metrics, and related fitness signals. Health data helps connect strength training with a broader view of activity and recovery.

BUILT FOR INTENTIONAL TRAINING
Use StreakRep if you want to:
• Build a custom gym or home workout plan
• Follow structured routines instead of improvising
• Log sets, reps, weight, and rest without friction
• Track strength progress and weekly consistency
• Browse exercises by muscle group and equipment
• Review muscle balance and training focus
• Understand when your training is moving forward

MORE THAN A WORKOUT LOG
StreakRep combines the pieces many lifters usually keep in separate apps: a planner, workout diary, exercise catalog, routine library, progress dashboard, training calendar, muscle map, rest timer, 1RM estimator, and strength history. Your plan, today’s workout, previous performance, and weekly consistency stay connected.

DESIGNED FOR REAL TRAINING
Whether you train three days per week, follow a push pull legs split, build a full body routine, focus on glutes, chase stronger lifts, or just want a reliable gym tracker, StreakRep helps turn every session into useful training data.

STREAKREP PRO
StreakRep Pro unlocks advanced analytics, configurable progression, automatic backups, share cards, premium training tools, and expanded ways to manage your training history.

Download StreakRep Fit and make every workout easier to plan, record, and improve.

Terms of Use: https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/
promotionalText: Build smarter workout plans, log every set, track muscle balance, and see strength progress with Health, Apple Watch, widgets, and Live Activities.
